---
title: "Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration"
subtitle: "Symbolic dynamics and formal language theory"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, symbolic, submitted]
target-journal: "Journal of Number Theory"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics"
theorems: 68
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/releases/download/media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/releases/download/media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/releases/download/media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_podcast.wav"
description: "The Zeckendorf fold map is the normal-form map of a finite terminating confluent rewrite system, with a sharp block-bijection threshold at m=3. The right Fischer cover is identified as a suffix graph ..."
---

::: {.paper-badges}
[Journal of Number Theory]{.badge-journal}
[Submitted]{.badge-status-submitted}
[68 Theorems]{.badge-theorems}
[Symbolic dynamics and formal language theory]{.badge-scope}
:::

## Abstract

The Zeckendorf fold map is the normal-form map of a finite terminating confluent rewrite system, with a sharp block-bijection threshold at m=3. The right Fischer cover is identified as a suffix graph with 2^(m-1) states.

**Keywords:** Zeckendorf expansion, Fibonacci numeration, shifts of finite type, transducer theory, Markov chains

## Infographic

![resolution_folding_core_symbolic Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/papers-media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_infographic.png)

[📊 Slides](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/releases/download/media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_slides.pdf)
[🎧 Podcast](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/releases/download/media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_podcast.wav)
[🎬 Video](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/releases/download/media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_video.mp4)
[🖼️ Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/papers-media-v1/resolution_folding_core_symbolic_infographic.png)
:::

## Paper & Source

- [Full Paper (source in this repo)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/tree/master/papers/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics/)
- [Machine-verified proofs (Lean 4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
